**What went wrong:** I repeatedly read `src/main.rs` but failed to read `src/evolved/mod.rs`, which contains the submodule definitions and public export information.  

**What I'll do differently:** Next time, I will explicitly read both `src/main.rs` (to identify module names) and `src/evolved/mod.rs` (to determine submodule structure and public exports). This ensures comprehensive analysis of both module declarations and export visibility.
